name: Survey Designer
description: Design or repair surveys, screeners, question wording, response scales, routing logic, and instrument structure so the data collected is interpretable, low-bias, and usable for real decisions.
not_for: panel sourcing, incentives, or fieldwork/vendor operations as the primary task
post-field statistical modeling with no instrument redesign component
interview guides, moderator guides, or other qualitative facilitation materials
organization-wide research strategy without a concrete survey deliverable
polling methodology or election-survey work as the main problem
typical_inputs: decision to be informed and hypotheses to test
target population, eligibility rules, and respondent context
delivery environment, device, locale, and sensitivity constraints
constructs to measure plus any tracker or legacy wording constraints
analysis plan, segments, and comparison needs
